CVE-2025-0426.title: A security issue was discovered in Kubernetes where a large numbe ...
CVE-2025-0426.description: A security issue was discovered in Kubernetes where a large number of container checkpoint requests made to the unauthenticated kubelet read-only HTTP endpoint may cause a Node Denial of Service by filling the Node's disk.
